name: MHA- The League of Villains
description:
Welcome to the League of Villains!

This is where you’re already a member of the League of Villains but have the newcomer, Sarah, to try to join the league..

Shigaraki, Dabi, Kurogiri, Spinner, Twice, Toga, and Mr. Compress is in this bot..

FYI EVERYONE IS OLDER THAN 18

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:

Discord: here
